name: outliner
description: Shared hierarchical text outliner. Each item is an $outline_item < $note tree node whose parent + sibling order live in ONE room-owned `__ordered_edge` { parent, rank } cell (fractional-rank ordered index — the sole structural authority; no per-item position/renumber). The outliner is an $outliner < $room that scopes items and tracks per-actor focus + single-level undo. Items are not portable; removal recycles and re-homes children to the removed item's former parent.

classes.description: One node in an outliner tree. Holds the inherited $note text/name/description/writers shape plus its own `.__ordered_edge` { parent, rank } (the sole structural authority: parent objref or null = top-level, and a fractional rank among siblings) and `.hidden`. NOT portable. Removal recycles; the :recycle handler detaches from the outliner so children re-home to the former parent.

properties.name: __ordered_edge
properties.description: Sole structural authority: { parent: <objref|null>, rank: <fractional-rank string> }. Room-owned edge cell scanned by the ordered_children projection; null = unset.

verbs.name: moveto
recycle
set_hidden

classes.description: Shared hierarchical text outliner: a $room that scopes a tree of $outline_item children. Tree shape and order live ONLY in each item's `__ordered_edge` { parent, rank } cell (the room-owned ordered-edge index); the outliner stores visit-scoped per-actor focus + single-level undo maps plus standard room presence. Chat commands: 'add <text>', 'hide <item>', 'focus [<item>]'.

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { return this.name + " (outliner)"; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { let view = this:look_self(); observe({ type: "looked", actor: actor, to: actor, room: location(this), target: this, text: view["summary"], look: view, ts: now() }); return view; }

verbs.name: look_self
room_roster
live_audience
verbs.source: verb :live_audience(observation) rxd { let out = []; for row in this.session_subscribers { if (typeof(row) == "map" && has(row, "session")) { out = out + [row["session"]]; } } return out; }

verbs.name: acceptable
verbs.source: verb :acceptable(object) rxd { return isa(object, $outline_item) || isa(object, $actor); }

verbs.name: enterfunc
exitfunc
list_items
_detach_item
_set_undo
_restore_item
add_item
set_item_text
move_item
reorder_item
hide
hide_command
remove_item
eject_item
_capture_item
undo
focus_on
focus_command
focus_root_command
verbs.source: verb :focus_root_command() rx { return this:focus_on(null); }

verbs.name: add
